errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

register.title: Create your account
register.professional: I'm a barber or shop owner
register.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, with one letter and one number.

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.passwordStrength: At least 8 characters, with one letter and one number.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

services.title: Pick your services
services.subtitle: Choose one or more services to book.

slot.title: Pick a day and time
slot.subtitle: Available slots are based on the barber's schedule.
slot.rescheduleSubtitle: Your existing payment stays with the appointment — no need to pay again.

payment.heading: How would you like to pay?
payment.holdOnline: Your slot is held for 15 minutes while you complete payment.
payment.holdAtShop: Choose how to pay. Your booking is confirmed as soon as you continue.
payment.onlineDesc: Card via Stripe. Slot locked instantly.
payment.atShopDesc: Hand it over at the counter after your cut.
payment.atShopInfo: You'll pay {price} at the shop on the day of your appointment.
payment.onlineInfo: We'll hold your slot and redirect you to Stripe's secure checkout for {price}.

summary.title: Booking summary
summary.subtitle: Review your selections below.
summary.servicesPlaceholder: Services will appear here once you pick them.

services_.empty: This barber hasn't added any services yet.

confirmation.title: Booking confirmed
confirmation.subtitle: Your appointment has been booked successfully.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account information.
settings.loadError: Failed to load profile. Please refresh the page.
settings.photoHint: JPG or PNG, up to 5 MB.
settings.bioPlaceholder: Tell clients about yourself and your specialties…

explore.heroTitle: Book your next haircut in minutes.
explore.heroSubtitle: Browse barbershops near you, see real availability, and reserve a chair online — no calls or waiting.
explore.locationOff: Location is off — showing central Tashkent.
explore.noResultsHint: Try clearing the filters to see more results.
explore.howTitle: From opening an app to sitting in a chair — in three taps.
explore.step1Desc: Filter by price, rating, or proximity. See who's open right now.
explore.step2Desc: Real availability, picked in one screen. No phone tag.
explore.step3Desc: Pay online or at the shop. Get a reminder the morning of.
explore.ctaDesc: Join customers booking online every day.

search.title: Search
search.tryBroadening: Try broadening the search or clearing some filters.

shopDetail.notFoundDesc: This barbershop may have been removed, or the link is no longer valid.
shopDetail.offeredBy: Offered by {count} barber | Offered by {count} barbers
shopDetail.chooseBarber: Choose any barber from the shop.

review.title: Leave a review
review.subtitle: How was your appointment with {barber}?
review.appointmentNotFoundDesc: This appointment is no longer available for review.
review.reviewPlaceholder: What stood out? Would you book again?
review.thanksDesc: Your feedback helps other customers pick the right barber.
review.errorGeneric: Couldn’t submit your review. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Analytics
dashboard.subtitle: How your bookings, revenue, and reputation are trending.
dashboard.peakHoursSubtitle: Share of bookings per hour of day.
dashboard.outcomesSubtitle: Every booking made with you in this window.
dashboard.ratingDistributionSubtitle: Based on all {count} reviews you've received.

subline.repeatLine: {repeat} / {unique} customer booked more than once | {repeat} / {unique} customers booked more than once

trend.title: Bookings trend & 7-day forecast
trend.subtitle: The dashed line is a moving-average projection of your recent pace.
trend.empty: No booking data for this period.

dashboard.noReviews: Reviews will show up here as soon as customers leave them.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Manage the services you offer, along with prices and durations.
services.emptyDesc: Add your first service to start accepting bookings.
services.name: Name
services.deleteConfirmDesc: This can't be undone. Existing bookings will still show the name and price you charged.

errors.priceInvalid: Price must be a positive number.
errors.durationInvalid: Duration must be between 15 and 180 minutes.

availability.title: Availability
availability.subtitle: Set your weekly working hours and block specific days.
availability.weeklyHint: Your regular working hours. Set days off by toggling 'Working'.
availability.dateBlocksHint: Block a full day or specific hours for holidays, appointments, etc.
availability.pickDateHint: Click any day on the calendar to block the full day or a time range.

barberAppointments.title: My appointments
barberAppointments.subtitle: Browse your schedule day by day and manage bookings.
barberAppointments.emptyDesc: When customers book with you for this day, they'll show up here.
barberAppointments.emptyTabHint: Switch to another tab to see appointments in a different status.
barberAppointments.cancelBody: The customer will be notified that their slot is no longer held.
barberAppointments.noShowBody: Use this only after the customer didn't arrive. This can't be undone.

overview.title: Shop overview
overview.subtitle: Your shop at a glance.
overview.noShop: You haven't set up your shop yet
overview.noShopDesc: Create your shop profile so customers can find you.

analytics.title: Shop analytics
analytics.subtitle: Track performance across your entire team.

barbers.title: Barbers
barbers.subtitle: Manage the barbers in your shop.
barbers.emptyDesc: Invite barbers to your shop to start taking bookings.
barbers.removeBody: They will no longer appear on your shop page. Past appointments are kept.

shop.title: My shop
shop.subtitle: Keep your shop profile up to date.

shopWizard.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell customers what makes your shop special…
shopWizard.photosHint: Drag or click to upload up to 6 photos. First photo is the cover.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.subtitle: Check your inbox for a verification link.
verifyEmail.success: Email verified! You can now sign in.
verifyEmail.failed: Verification link is invalid or has expired.
verifyEmail.resendFailed: Couldn't resend email. Try again in a minute.

toasts.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
